title: Magic Materials
description:
Magic, Creatures, Machines, and Space!
Journey from ancient spells to interstellar travel — explore every realm!
body:
# 🌌 **Magic Materials: Myths to Machines**

✨ **Official Magic Materials Minecraft Server!**
Join our community to explore, build, and play together.

## 🌍 **Community Server**

> 🖥️ **Server IP:** Available on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/NKWmubUZjF)

Join our **always-online Magic Materials server** — a dedicated **24/7 world** for players to **build, explore, and collaborate**.

Our community hosts **multiple ongoing projects**, **custom minigames**, and a **central hub world** where everyone can connect, share creations, and team up for adventures.

> ### 🧭 **Want to host your own server?**
>
> Download the **[Magic Materials: Required on Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/magic-materials-required-on-server)** pack to get started.

---

## ✨ **Features & Themes**

### 🪄 Magic, Mysticism & Myth

Uncover the secrets of the arcane, bond with mythical creatures, and harness ancient power.

* [Mana and Artifice](https://modrinth.com/mod/mana-and-artifice) – advanced spellcraft and runic magic
* [Dragon Mounts: Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-legacy) & [Dragon Mounts Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts-patches) – hatch, raise, and ride dragons
* [Dragon Magic And Relics](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-magic-and-relics) – draconic relics and magical artifacts
* [Asoteria](https://modrinth.com/mod/asoteria) – mysterious dimensions of myth and legend
* [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting) – artistic expression through magic

---

### 🧑‍🌾 Civilization, Villagers & Companions

Build thriving settlements, manage villagers, and lead intelligent companions in your growing world.

* [Villager Workers](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-workers) – automate labor with working villagers
* [Villager Quests](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-quests) – take on villager missions for rewards
* [Villager Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-names-serilum) – gives every villager a unique name
* [Villager Recruits](https://modrinth.com/mod/villager-recruits) – enlist villagers as soldiers and adventurers
* [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers) & [Gourd Guards!](https://modrinth.com/mod/gourd-guards!) – protect settlements from raids
* [Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits), [Ribbits: Croaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits-croaks), [Guard Ribbits](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-ribbits) – amphibian allies and defenders

---

### 🌿 Nature, Creatures & Survival

Explore a vibrant world full of new creatures, factions, and enhanced survival systems.

* [Creatures Expanded](https://modrinth.com/mod/creatures-expanded) – expanded wildlife and biomes
* [Factions And Curiosities](https://modrinth.com/mod/factions-and-curiosities) – dynamic NPC societies and encounters
* [Tree Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester) & [Ore Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-harvester) – efficient resource gathering
* [Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims) – cooperative play and land protection
* [Nether Weather](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherweather) – atmospheric weather in the Nether
* [Starter Kit](https://modrinth.com/mod/starter-kit) – starter items for new players

---

### ⚙️ Technology, Automation & Engineering

Power your world with complex machines, factories, and interdimensional infrastructure.

* [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Create: New Age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age), [Create Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vinery), [Create Nether Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-nether-vinery), [Clockwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clockwork) – mechanical automation and kinetic systems
* [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism) & addons:
  * [Mekanism Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-generators)
  * [Mekanism Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-tools)
  * [Mekanism Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-additions)
  * [Mekanism Turrets](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-turrets)
  * [Mekanism Covers](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-covers)
  * [Mekanism: Plums](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-plums)
* [RFTools Base](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-base), [RFTools Builder](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-builder), [RFTools Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-control), [RFTools Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-storage), [RFTools Dimensions](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-dimensions), [RFTools Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-utility) – automation, teleportation, and dimensional tools
* [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) & [AE2 Wireless Terminals](https://modrinth.com/mod/applied-energistics-2-wireless-terminals) – advanced item storage and networks
* [Ender IO](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio) – conduits, automation, and machines
* [Botarium](https://modrinth.com/mod/botarium) – fluid and energy management
* [Draconic Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/draconic-evolution) & [Brandons Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/brandons-core) – endgame tech and energy systems

---

### 🚀 Exploration, Travel & Space

Journey across dimensions, discover new realms, and reach for the stars.

* [Dimensional Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimensionaldoors) – hidden dimensions and pocket dungeons
* [Lodestone Warps](https://modrinth.com/mod/lodestone-warps) – teleportation anchors for easy travel
* [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) & [Valkyrien Space War](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-space-war) – physics-based ships and space warfare
* [Starlance](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlance), [Deep Space](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep_space), [Cosmic Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmic-horizons-cosmos) – interstellar exploration and cosmic adventure

---

### 🎧 Optional Client Mods *(Disabled by Default)*

Enable these on the client for a richer audiovisual experience.

* [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
* [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model)
* [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound), [M.R.U](https://modrinth.com/mod/mru)
* [Tiny Item Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-item-animations)
* [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)

---

### 🔧 Libraries & Dependencies

Core libraries and APIs required for stability and mod interoperability.

* [Forgified Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgified-fabric-api)
* [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)
* [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
* [VLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/vlib)
* [McJtyLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcjtylib)
* [CodeChicken Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/codechicken-lib)
* [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
* [Caelus API](https://modrinth.com/mod/caelus)
* [YUNG’s API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api)
* [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)
* [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)

---

### 🧰 Utility, Interfaces & Miscellaneous

Helpful mods that improve usability, gameplay balance, and immersion.

* [GuideME](https://modrinth.com/mod/guideme) – in-game tutorials and guides
* [Xaero’s World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) – full world mapping
* [Respawn Delay](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawn-delay) – adds configurable respawn timers
* [Superb VS](https://modrinth.com/mod/superbvs), [Superb Warfare](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare), [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked), [CC: VS](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-vs) – scripting, simulation, and combat expansion
* [[Let’s Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery), [[Let’s Do] NetherVinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-nethervinery) – food and brewing systems for vineyards
